title.text: Frequency of Daily Consumption for Respondants Age <=18's
subtitle: This bar chart shows us how frequently on average Respondants Age <= 18 who consume food items daily
consume on a daily basis. For example, the respondants on average answers they eat chicken daily 3 times
this means they eat chicken 3 times every day on average.

transform.calculate: datum.food_item == 'Q11_1_Rice_Frequency' ? 'Rice' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_3_Noodles_Frequency' ? 'Noodles' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_6_Bread_Frequency' ? 'Bread' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_7_Roti_Canai_Frequency' ? 'Roti Canai' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_9_ChickenDuck_Frequency' ? 'Chicken/Duck' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_10_Meat_Frequency_Average_day' ? 'Meat' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_13_Fish_Frequency' ? 'Fish' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_15_Eggs_Frequency' ? 'Eggs' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_16_Burger_Frequency' ? 'Burger' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_17_FriedChicken_Frequency' ? 'Fried Chicken' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_22_Milk_Frequency' ? 'Milk' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_24_GreenLeafyVegetables_Frequency' ? 'Vegetables' : datum.food_item == 'Q11_30_FruitVegetables_Frequency' ? 'Fruits' : 'Other'
